STANDARD INSTRUCTIONS FOR AI AGENTS WORKING ON FIN-INSIGHT PROJECT

=== PROJECT OVERVIEW ===
Project: Fin-Insight (ZZPJ 2025/2026)
Team: AlfaTeam
Description: Intelligent investment assistant with portfolio tracking, market data aggregation, and AI-powered recommendations

=== REPOSITORY STRUCTURE ===
- backend/ → Java Spring Boot microservices
- frontend/ → React + TypeScript + Vite
- docs/ → Project documentation
  - architecture.md → System design
  - conventions.md → Code standards, branching, commits
  - api/ → API endpoints documentation
  - llms.txt → This file

=== KEY SERVICES ===
1. Portfolio Manager (8081) → Portfolio, assets, transactions
2. Market Data Service (8082) → Prices, symbols, market data
3. AI Advisor Service (8083) → AI recommendations
4. Keycloak (8080) → Authentication/Authorization
5. Eureka Server (8761) → Service discovery
6. Config Server (8888) → Centralized configuration

=== TECHNOLOGY STACK ===
Backend:
  - Java 21 LTS
  - Spring Boot 3.x
  - Spring Cloud (Eureka, Config)
  - Spring Security (OAuth2/JWT)
  - JPA/Hibernate
  - PostgreSQL
  - Redis
  - Gradle

Frontend:
  - React 18+
  - TypeScript
  - Vite
  - Tailwind CSS
  - shadcn/ui

DevOps:
  - Docker & Docker Compose
  - PostgreSQL 16
  - Redis 7
  - Keycloak 24

=== BRANCHING CONVENTION ===
Format: <type>/<ID-linear>/<description>

Types:
  - feature/ → New functionality
  - fix/ → Bug fix
  - refactor/ → Code refactoring
  - docs/ → Documentation
  - chore/ → Technical tasks

Examples:
  - feature/ALF-17/add-portfolio-api
  - fix/ALF-23/fix-transaction-validation
  - docs/ALF-42/api-documentation

Rules:
  - Always branch from main
  - Never push directly to main
  - Use lowercase with hyphens
  - Linear ID is mandatory

=== COMMIT CONVENTION ===
Format: <type>(<scope>): <description>

Types:
  - feat → New feature
  - fix → Bug fix
  - docs → Documentation
  - style → Code formatting
  - refactor → Code refactoring
  - perf → Performance optimization
  - test → Tests
  - chore → Technical tasks
  - ci → CI/CD changes

Examples:
  - feat(portfolio-manager): add endpoint to delete assets
  - fix(market-data): fix price caching issue
  - docs(api): update endpoint documentation
  - test(auth): add JWT validation tests

Rules:
  - Use imperative mood (add, fix, change - not added, fixed)
  - Lowercase first letter
  - No period at the end
  - Max 50 characters for first line
  - Link to Linear issue: "Fixes ALF-17"

=== LINEAR INTEGRATION ===
- Every branch must have Linear ID (ALF-XX)
- Commit messages should reference issue: "Fixes ALF-17"
- PR title should include ID: "[ALF-17] Add portfolio API"
- Use keywords: Fixes, Closes, Resolves

=== PULL REQUEST PROCESS ===
1. Create branch from main
2. Make commits with convention
3. Push branch
4. Open PR with description
5. Link to Linear issue
6. Wait for code review (Gemini + team)
7. Merge after approval and green CI

Requirements:
  - Minimum 1 approval from team
  - All tests must pass
  - No breaking changes
  - Documentation updated

=== DOCKER COMMANDS ===
Start all services:
  cd backend && docker-compose up -d

Stop all services:
  docker-compose down

View logs:
  docker-compose logs -f <service-name>

Rebuild service:
  docker-compose up -d --build <service-name>

=== API DOCUMENTATION ===
See docs/api/ folder for detailed endpoint documentation:
  - portfolios.md → Portfolio, assets, transactions
  - market-data.md → Symbols, prices
  - recommendations.md → AI recommendations

All endpoints require JWT Bearer token in Authorization header.

=== AUTHENTICATION ===
Keycloak handles authentication:
  - URL: http://localhost:8080
  - Realm: fin-insight
  - Default admin: admin/admin

Get JWT token:
  curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/realms/fin-insight/protocol/openid-connect/token \
    -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" \
    -d "grant_type=password&client_id=fin-insight&username=user&password=password"

=== TESTING ===
Backend:
  ./gradlew test
  ./gradlew jacocoTestReport (coverage)

Frontend:
  npm test
  npm run test:coverage

Minimum coverage: 80%

=== CODE QUALITY ===
Backend:
  ./gradlew checkstyleMain
  ./gradlew spotbugsMain

Frontend:
  npm run lint
  npm run format

=== USEFUL ENDPOINTS ===
Swagger UI (API docs): http://localhost:8081/swagger-ui.html
Keycloak Admin: http://localhost:8080/admin
Eureka Dashboard: http://localhost:8761
Config Server: http://localhost:8888

=== ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES ===
Backend (.env):
  - POSTGRES_VERSION=16-alpine
  - REDIS_VERSION=7-alpine
  - KEYCLOAK_VERSION=24.0
  - KEYCLOAK_ADMIN=admin
  - KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin

Frontend (.env):
  - VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:8081

=== COMMON ISSUES ===
Service won't start:
  - Check logs: docker-compose logs <service>
  - Verify .env file
  - Check port availability: lsof -i :<port>

Database connection error:
  - Ensure PostgreSQL is running
  - Verify credentials in .env
  - Check network connectivity

JWT token expired:
  - Re-login in Keycloak
  - Get new token

=== RESOURCES ===
- Architecture: docs/architecture.md
- Conventions: docs/conventions.md
- API Docs: docs/api/*.md
- GitHub: https://github.com/AlfaTeam67/ZZPJ
- Linear: https://linear.app (project: Fin-Insight)

=== TEAM CONTACTS ===
See Linear for team members and responsibilities.

=== LAST UPDATED ===
2025-01-20
